lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear. All mechanical components are fully functional.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light scratches. The interior is well-kept with minimal signs of wear. All mechanical components are functioning properly.
Fair condition.

Get ready for a fantastic value! This car is a dependable workhorse that’s perfect for your daily commute. While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of service and will benefit from a bit of routine maintenance, it remains a reliable and functional ride. It’s a great chance to own a capable vehicle at an accessible price point!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold with full transparency regarding its wear. The exterior paint has several visible scratches and a few minor dents on the passenger side door and rear bumper. Inside, the cabin shows clear signs of use, including noticeable wear on the driver's seat bolster and some light staining on the rear floor mats. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives fine, though it is due for a scheduled service and the tires will likely need replacement within the next few thousand miles. All major electronics work, but the infotainment screen has a small crack that does not affect touch functionality. This is a reliable choice for someone looking for a budget-friendly option who doesn't mind some cosmetic and maintenance needs.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine struggles to start and idles roughly, while the transmission exhibits significant slipping during gear changes. Cosmetically, there is noticeable body rust, peeling clear coat, and the interior shows heavy wear including several tears in the upholstery. This is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project car or for parts, as it is not currently reliable for daily use.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle exhibits a commendable balance of performance and preservation. Maintained to a high standard, the mechanical systems operate with precision, while the interior and exterior reflect a history of diligent care. This offering provides an exceptional value proposition for those seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she's been such a joy to drive! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it the perfect choice for anyone looking for a dependable set of wheels that still has plenty of life and spirit left. It's clean, super comfy, and totally ready for its next big adventure with you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains taut, benefitting from a reinforced rear subframe and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Recent service includes a VANOS overhaul and valve adjustment to ensure the high-revving valvetrain operates within peak tolerances. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering a visceral driving experience with precise turn-in and balanced weight distribution.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Mechanically sound. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and style. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road-wear consistent with its age, while the alloy wheels remain free of significant curbing. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, and the dashboard remains crack-free with all electronic components—including the dual-zone climate control and premium sound system—functioning exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, reflecting a consistent maintenance schedule with recent fluid changes and a fresh set of tires. It drives straight and true, offering a comfortable ride that handles both city streets and highway speeds with ease. This car is ready for its next owner, providing a turnkey experience for a buyer who values a well-preserved, dependable ride.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been subjected to rigorous inspections to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced combination of luxury and utility, this vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of notable mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance, this unit offers a sophisticated driving experience and long-term dependability. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber vehicle that balances superior functionality with exceptional value.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure, you've found it! This car has been super dependable for me and is still in really solid shape. It’s got that perfect balance of being well-loved but clearly well-maintained. It drives smooth and is just waiting for someone new to get behind the wheel. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically robust example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features a crisp throttle response via its individual throttle bodies, pulling hard to the 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers precise engagement, while the factory limited-slip differential ensures optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. Crucial preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive Vanos overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to maintain chassis rigidity. While the exterior shows minor stone chips and interior bolsters reflect standard wear, the suspension bushings and dampers remain tight, providing the balanced handling dynamics this chassis is known for. This is a driver-focused machine with a sorted drivetrain, ready for the curves.
Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Routine maintenance complete. Minor wear only. Reliable.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor signs of careful road use, while the interior is exceptionally clean, featuring supple upholstery and a smoke-free cabin. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the climate control, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has benefited from a rigorous service schedule, including recent fluid flushes and a fresh set of high-performance tires. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident driving experience. Garage-kept and treated with pride, this car comes with a full service history and is ready for its next chapter. It is a solid, honest example of quality engineering that has been preserved with the utmost care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and refinement. Demonstrating robust mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic presence, this automobile has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance. It offers a smooth, responsive driving experience and stands as a testament to conscientious ownership. A truly dependable investment for those who value long-term quality.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. We invite you to experience the reliability and sophisticated performance of this distinguished model.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so it’s totally ready for all your new adventures! It runs like a dream and is super reliable for daily commutes or fun weekend trips. There are a few tiny signs of use here and there, but honestly, it still looks great and feels fantastic on the road. I'd love for it to go to a good home where it'll be appreciated just as much as I've enjoyed it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically robust, the VANOS system has been serviced and the rear subframe reinforced for structural integrity. It retains its factory limited-slip differential and M-tuned suspension geometry, offering exceptional turn-in and telepathic feedback. While showing honest signs of use, this driver-focused example remains a visceral analog experience for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is an exceptional example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday practicality. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though minor stone chips on the front fascia reflect its honest road history. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the leather seats show minimal wear, and all original instrumentation and climate controls function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, featuring a responsive engine and a smooth-shifting transmission that has been serviced at regular intervals. It sits on a set of premium tires with plenty of tread remaining. Included is a complete folder of service receipts, documenting its careful upkeep. This car is ready for the road, offering a refined driving experience for its next owner.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both reliability and performance. The interior remains remarkably preserved, reflecting a history of diligent care. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value. We invite you to experience this distinguished example firsthand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of performance and reliability. It presents in commendable condition, featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile that ensures a refined driving experience. An exemplary choice for the discerning professional seeking exceptional value in a premium pre-owned motorcar.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable for me, and I know you’re going to love how it handles. It’s clean, comfy, and just waiting for someone new to take the wheel. Let's get you on the road!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically robust, it has had the critical VANOS servicing and rear subframe reinforcement already addressed. The chassis remains taut, upgraded with Bilstein dampers and polyurethane bushings for sharpened turn-in and reduced deflection. Power is efficiently transferred via the factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. While the finish shows minor signs of spirited road use, the drivetrain is dialed and the valve clearances are within spec. A purist-spec driver’s car optimized for mechanical longevity and tactile feedback.
Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Mechanically sound. Minimal exterior wear.

Experience the perfect blend of performance and practicality with this well-maintained gem. This vehicle boasts a clean title and a consistent service record, ensuring the engine and transmission remain in top-tier working order. The exterior finish is vibrant, showing only minor signs of road wear consistent with its age, while the interior remains a pristine, smoke-free environment with comfortable, supportive seating. From the responsive handling to the ice-cold A/C and intuitive tech features, every detail has been preserved to provide a dependable and enjoyable ride. Recently inspected and detailed, this car is turn-key ready for your daily commute or weekend adventures.

Presented in well-maintained condition, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. It has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our standards for performance and reliability. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and long-term value.
